featureName: Sprint — Fix Rendering + Integration Tests + Discovery
description: Fix rendering exceptions, run comprehensive integration tests, discover and fix remaining issues.

userStories.title: Fix rendering exceptions found during integration tests
userStories.description: Integration tests pass but stderr shows EXCEPTION CAUGHT BY RENDERING/SCHEDULER LIBRARY. Capture full stack traces, identify which widgets cause them, and fix.
acceptanceCriteria: Run poster_journey integration test, capture all EXCEPTION lines with full stack traces
Identify each unique rendering exception source (file + line)
Fix each one — common causes: unconstrained widgets, missing Expanded, overflow
Re-run test — verify 0 rendering exceptions in stderr

userStories.title: Comprehensive bid flow integration test
userStories.description: Write and run integration test covering full bid lifecycle with latest code: provider bids, poster reviews with confirmation dialog, accepts, provider starts work, poster marks complete, both review.
acceptanceCriteria: If they fail, fix the failures
If they pass, verify no rendering exceptions
Run all 5 integration tests as regression check
flutter analyze 0 errors, flutter test all pass

userStories.title: Discover and fix remaining user-facing bugs
userStories.description: Audit all screens for remaining issues: missing loading states, broken navigation, visual glitches, data not displaying correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Grep for remaining e.toString(), empty catch blocks, Size(double.infinity)
flutter analyze 0 errors, flutter test all pass
